name: merx
description: MERX official Claude Code plugin marketplace. Installs the merx plugin which connects Claude to the MERX TRON infrastructure (64 MCP tools for energy market, TRC-20 stablecoin payments, x402 facilitation, and agent payment service).

plugins.name: merx
plugins.description: TRON infrastructure for AI agents on Claude Code. Auto-registers the hosted MERX MCP server (64 tools), adds slash commands for the most common operations (prices, buy energy, balance, tx lookup, send), and ships a tron-agent-engineer subagent specialized in building agentic payment workflows on TRON.
